description: Fix 5 review issues: calendar currentDate useEffect dep, chat panel detached state reset on close, chat panel drag constraints, Spotify drag-vs-click conflict, and Spotify button constraint staleness on resize.
steps: In frontend/app/dashboard/calendar/page.tsx: Add currentDate to the useEffect dependency array for fetching events so navigation triggers a re-fetch.
In frontend/app/dashboard/layout.tsx: When onClose is called, also reset detached to false so re-opening chat starts in attached mode.
In frontend/components/chat/AIChatPanel.tsx: Add dragConstraints to the detached floating window using a constraintsRef approach (a fixed inset-0 div).
In frontend/components/SpotifyMiniPlayer.tsx: Prevent click from firing after a drag by tracking drag state with a ref and skipping handleExpand if drag just occurred.
In frontend/components/SpotifyMiniPlayer.tsx: Add a window resize listener that updates the button Y constraints to handle viewport resize.
acceptance_criteria: Navigating forward/backward in day/week/month view triggers a re-fetch of events
Closing the detached AI chat and reopening shows attached panel mode
Detached AI chat window cannot be dragged offscreen
Spotify button click does not fire after a drag gesture
Spotify button constraints update when viewport is resized
npm run build passes without errors
